text: monitoring gap found during ACME-201 review: we had no alert on db pool saturation. added, fires at 80%
postmortem for the june 9 outage (ACME-201) is filed and reviewed. 4 action items, all ticketed. good process everyone
password-reset email delays confirmed as a sendgrid issue on their side, their status page acknowledges. downgrading to P2, monitoring
